name: rocket
description: Rocket — a Postman-inspired API platform. Independent frontend/ and backend/ projects.

scripts.install:all: pnpm -C frontend install && pnpm -C backend install
scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.sync:types: cp backend/shared/src/*.ts frontend/types/ && echo 'synced backend/shared -> frontend/types'
